# Herbert Bay - AI Product Executive

AI Product Executive with 22+ years building AI products • PhD Computer Vision (ETH Zurich) • 7 AI Products • 4 Ventures • 2 Exits • 40K+ Citations

## Summary

Serial AI entrepreneur and executive with 20+ years building and scaling AI products across Europe and the US. Co-founder and CEO of Earkick, developing Mia21—an advanced memory system for conversational AI. PhD in Computer Vision from ETH Zurich, co-creator of the SURF algorithm (40K+ citations), and proven track record scaling ventures from inception to successful exits. Combines deep technical expertise with operational leadership and board advisory experience.

## Current

**Mia21** - https://mia21.com
Co-Founder & CEO • AI Memory Platform
Enterprise conversational AI infrastructure with superior memory. SDKs for iOS, Android, Python, Javascript. LLM-agnostic architecture powering 250K+ user platform.

**Earkick** - https://earkick.com  
Co-Founder & CEO • Mental Health AI (2021-Present)
AI-powered mental health platform • 4.8★ rating • Featured by Apple, TIME, Forbes, National Geographic • Swiss-made, fully private

## Background

**Education**
PhD Computer Vision, ETH Zurich (2009)
Lead-inventor of SURF algorithm • 40,000+ citations • Koenderink Prize 2016

**Ventures**
- kooaba (2006-2014) — Co-founder & CEO • First cloud-based image recognition platform • Exit to Qualcomm 2014
- 47nord (2012-2023) — Co-founder & Board Member • Home of Shortcut and Inspiced
- Captural (2019-2023) — CEO & Co-initiator • AI-enabled photo-book application at Ifolor
- Earkick (2021-Present) — Co-founder & CEO • Mental health AI platform

**AI Products**
- Mia21 — AI memory platform for conversational AI
- Earkick — Mental health AI with real-time biomarker analysis
- PMF Engine — AI-powered product-market fit assessment
- kooaba — Cloud-based image recognition (now Snapchat AR)
- Captural — AI photo-book creation
- Shortcut — Secure notes with AI features
- Inspiced — AI-powered cooking recommendations

**Leadership Experience**
- Magic Leap — Led Computer Vision and Machine Learning teams
- Ifolor — Board of Directors (2019-2023)
- ETH Zurich — PhD Computer Vision (2002-2006)

## Stats

- 7 AI products built
- 4 ventures founded (kooaba, 47nord, Captural, Earkick)
- 2 successful exits (Qualcomm 2014, Captural/Ifolor 2023)
- 40,000+ research citations (SURF algorithm)
- 22+ years experience in AI/ML/Computer Vision
